name: edify-planning-tool
description: The Edify Planning & Monitoring backend, rebuilt in **Django 5 + Django REST Framework** (replacing the previous NestJS + Prisma backend). The School Directory is the source of truth; ~200 endpoints across 33 domain apps; JWT access + rotating refresh tokens; a 38-key RBAC permission matrix with data-access scope resolution; a tamper-evident audit hash-chain; realtime SSE; and 4 background jobs.
